'''âk-d-s''' ('''kakadas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jet|jet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jet|jet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kakadas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadas|thikadas]] || [[word:jikadas|jikadas]] || [[word:shikadas|shikadas]] || [[word:kikadas|kikadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadas|thuthukadas]] || [[word:jujukadas|jujukadas]] || [[word:shushukadas|shushukadas]] || [[word:kukukadas|kukukadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadas|thukadas]] || [[word:jukadas|jukadas]] || [[word:shukadas|shukadas]] || [[word:kukadas|kukadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadas|thukadas]] || [[word:jukadas|jukadas]] || [[word:shukadas|shukadas]] || [[word:kukadas|kukadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadas|thekadas]] || [[word:jekadas|jekadas]] || [[word:shekadas|shekadas]] || [[word:kekadas|kekadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadas|thothokadas]] || [[word:jojokadas|jojokadas]] || [[word:shoshokadas|shoshokadas]] || [[word:kokokadas|kokokadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadas|thokadas]] || [[word:jokadas|jokadas]] || [[word:shokadas|shokadas]] || [[word:kokadas|kokadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadas|thokadas]] || [[word:jokadas|jokadas]] || [[word:shokadas|shokadas]] || [[word:kokadas|kokadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkadas|thĂŠkadas]] || [[word:jĂŠkadas|jĂŠkadas]] || [[word:shĂŠkadas|shĂŠkadas]] || [[word:kĂŠkadas|kĂŠkadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadas|thathakadas]] || [[word:jajakadas|jajakadas]] || [[word:shashakadas|shashakadas]] || [[word:kakakadas|kakakadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadas|thakadas]] || [[word:jakadas|jakadas]] || [[word:shakadas|shakadas]] || [[word:kakadas|kakadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadas|thakadas]] || [[word:jakadas|jakadas]] || [[word:shakadas|shakadas]] || [[word:kakadas|kakadas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakadas|shakadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakadas|goshakadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakadas|gokishakadas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakadasnĂŒ|shakadasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakadasnknĂŒ|goshakadasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadasnĂŒ|gokishakadasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakadashĂ«|shakadashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakadasnkshĂ«|goshakadasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakadashĂ«|gokishakadashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadasro|shakadasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadasnkro|goshakadasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadasro|gokishakadasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadasmu|shakadasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadasnkmu|goshakadasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadasmu|gokishakadasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakadasher|shakadasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakadasnksher|goshakadasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakadasher|gokishakadasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakadasng|shakadasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakadasnkng|goshakadasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakadasng|gokishakadasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakadasya|shakadasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakadasnkya|goshakadasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakadasya|gokishakadasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakadasyam|shakadasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakadasnkyam|goshakadasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakadasyam|gokishakadasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadasnĂŒshĂ«|shakadasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakadasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakadasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadasnĂŒro|shakadasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadasnknĂŒro|goshakadasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadasnĂŒro|gokishakadasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadasnĂŒmu|shakadasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadasnknĂŒmu|goshakadasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadasnĂŒmu|gokishakadasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadashĂ«nĂŒ|shakadashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakadasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakadashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadashĂ«ro|shakadashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadasnkshĂ«ro|goshakadasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadashĂ«ro|gokishakadashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadashĂ«mu|shakadashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadasnkshĂ«mu|goshakadasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadashĂ«mu|gokishakadashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadasronĂŒ|shakadasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadasnkronĂŒ|goshakadasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadasronĂŒ|gokishakadasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadasroshĂ«|shakadasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadasnkroshĂ«|goshakadasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadasroshĂ«|gokishakadasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadasromu|shakadasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadasnkromu|goshakadasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadasromu|gokishakadasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadasmunĂŒ|shakadasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadasnkmunĂŒ|goshakadasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadasmunĂŒ|gokishakadasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadasmushĂ«|shakadasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadasnkmushĂ«|goshakadasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadasmushĂ«|gokishakadasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadasmuro|shakadasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadasnkmuro|goshakadasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadasmuro|gokishakadasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|92df33c}}
